name: How I Made the Alpha Mine
original_name: How I Made the Alpha Mine
overview: Luca Conri is reluctantly put under the protection of his dominant Alpha -- and older brother's best friend -- Dalton Grey. However, everything changes when the two become fated mates, a bond that violates the natural order of the werewolf Pack.

trailers.title: How I Made the Alpha Mine EP1-11 | ReelShort
